title: Fluid Lab
description: Real-time Navier-Stokes fluid: inject dye, paint walls, vortex or tunnel presets, 4 display modes, PNG export.
concept: A WebGL2 fluid simulation using semi-Lagrangian advection and a Jacobi pressure solver. Draw dye streams, sculpt obstacles that redirect flow, toggle between dye/velocity/pressure/vorticity visualisations, and apply presets that seed vortex rings or rainbow tunnels.
features: 4 interaction modes: dye inject, velocity force, wall paint, erase
4 display modes: dye, velocity field, pressure field, vorticity
3 animated presets: Vortex ring, Wind tunnel, Fountain rain
Tunable brush size, force strength, dye decay, vorticity confinement

interaction.mouse: drag to inject dye or force
